basic_info.description: I'm Rori Floris. I'm Blockchain developer. Experienced blockchain developer with a solid background in computer science and 5 years of dedicated experience in the field. Proficient in smart contract development, decentralized application (DApp) deployment, and blockchain optimization. Skilled in leading cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions across diverse industries. Passionate about leveraging blockchain technology to drive positive change and create value. Committed to continuous learning and staying updated on industry trends. Ready to apply expertise to challenging projects in the dynamic world of blockchain development.

projects.title: Lisk Website Design
projects.description: Lisk is a blockchain application platform. We make blockchain accessible by creating a world in which everyone benefits from this technology.

projects.title: Amulet Website Design
projects.description: Amulet puts reputation on the blockchain, exposing the accuracy of financial experts so traders can filter out the BS.

projects.title: Syscoin Website Design
projects.description: The powerful multi-purpose platform that puts your business on the blockchain

projects.title: VAIOT Website Design
projects.description: Blockchain and Artificial Intelligence (AI) are two ground-breaking technological trends which have the potential to become even more revolutionary when put together.
